title: ✅OPENAI - The application should be an internal HR workflow for a…

history.content: The application should be an internal HR workflow for authenticated employees and managers. An employee submits a leave request by filling in the leave type (required — dropdown: Annual Leave, Sick Leave, Personal Leave), start date (required), end date (required), a reason, and an optional file attachment such as a medical certificate. After submission, the employee's direct manager reviews the request and either approves or rejects it — a comment is mandatory in both cases. If the manager rejects the request, the employee receives an email notification and the request loops back so they can correct and resubmit. If the manager approves, the request moves to an HR officer for final approval. The HR officer verifies the leave balance and either confirms or rejects — rejection also loops back to the employee with an email. Once HR approves, the employee receives an email confirmation with the approved dates. At all times the employee should have a persistent status view showing the current stage of their request and any comments left by the manager or HR.

This workflow is an internal HR leave request process for authenticated employees and managers. Employees submit leave requests, which are reviewed by their manager (approve/reject with comment), and then by HR (approve/reject with comment). Rejections at any stage loop back to the employee for correction, with email notifications. The employee always has access to a persistent status view showing the current stage and all comments.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>hr_leave_request</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>HRL</initials>
  <title>HR Leave Request Workflow</title>
  <icon>event</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create"><id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="1"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("submit_request"); finishTask("submit_request") }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>

  <role><id>employee</id><title>Employee</title></role>
  <role><id>manager</id><title>Manager</title></role>
  <role><id>hr</id><title>HR Officer</title></role>
  <role><id>system</id><title>System</title></role>

  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>leave_type</id>
    <title>Leave Type</title>
    <options>
      <option key="annual">Annual Leave</option>
      <option key="sick">Sick Leave</option>
      <option key="personal">Personal Leave</option>
    </options>
  </data>
  <data type="date">
    <id>start_date</id>
    <title>Start Date</title>
  </data>
  <data type="date">
    <id>end_date</id>
    <title>End Date</title>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>reason</id>
    <title>Reason</title>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="file">
    <id>attachment</id>
    <title>Attachment</title>
    <component><name>preview</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>manager_comment</id>
    <title>Manager Comment</title>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>hr_comment</id>
    <title>HR Comment</title>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>status</id>
    <title>Status</title>
    <options>
      <option key="draft">Draft</option>
      <option key="manager_review">Manager Review</option>
      <option key="manager_rejected">Manager Rejected</option>
      <option key="hr_review">HR Review</option>
      <option key="hr_rejected">HR Rejected</option>
      <option key="approved">Approved</option>
    </options>
    <init>draft</init>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>employee_email</id>
    <title>Employee Email</title>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>go_manager_approve</id>
    <title>Go Manager Approve</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>go_manager_reject</id>
    <title>Go Manager Reject</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>go_hr_approve</id>
    <title>Go HR Approve</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="number">
    <id>go_hr_reject</id>
    <title>Go HR Reject</title>
    <init>0</init>
  </data>
  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>status_view</id>
    <title>Status View</title>
    <init>status_task</init>
  </data>

  <transition>
    <id>submit_request</id>
    <x>112</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Submit Leave Request</label>
    <icon>send</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>employee</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>submit_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Leave Request</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>leave_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>start_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>end_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="assign"><id>submit_assign</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="2"><![CDATA[
          employee_email: f.employee_email;
          change employee_email value { userService.loggedOrSystem.email }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
    <event type="finish"><id>submit_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="3"><![CDATA[
          go_manager_approve: f.go_manager_approve, go_manager_reject: f.go_manager_reject, status: f.status;
          change go_manager_approve value { 1 }; change go_manager_reject value { 0 };
          change status value { "manager_review" }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="4"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("manager_review"); finishTask("manager_review") }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>manager_review</id>
    <x>304</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Manager Review</label>
    <icon>assignment_ind</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>manager</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>manager_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Manager Decision</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>leave_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>start_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>end_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish"><id>manager_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="5"><![CDATA[
          go_manager_approve: f.go_manager_approve, go_manager_reject: f.go_manager_reject, status: f.status;
          // Approve or reject based on manager's decision (approve if comment starts with "APPROVE", else reject)
          def comment = (f.manager_comment.value ?: "").trim().toLowerCase()
          if (comment.startsWith("approve")) {
            change go_manager_approve value { 1 }; change go_manager_reject value { 0 };
            change status value { "hr_review" }
          } else {
            change go_manager_approve value { 0 }; change go_manager_reject value { 1 };
            change status value { "manager_rejected" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="6"><![CDATA[
          go_manager_reject: f.go_manager_reject, employee_email: f.employee_email, manager_comment: f.manager_comment;
          if ((go_manager_reject.value as Integer) == 1) {
            sendEmail([employee_email.value], "Leave Request Rejected by Manager", "Your leave request was rejected by your manager. Comment: ${manager_comment.value}")
            async.run { assignTask("submit_request"); finishTask("submit_request") }
          } else {
            async.run { assignTask("hr_review"); finishTask("hr_review") }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>hr_review</id>
    <x>496</x><y>208</y>
    <label>HR Review</label>
    <icon>how_to_reg</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>hr</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>hr_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>HR Officer Decision</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>hr_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>leave_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>start_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>end_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish"><id>hr_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="7"><![CDATA[
          go_hr_approve: f.go_hr_approve, go_hr_reject: f.go_hr_reject, status: f.status;
          // Approve if comment starts with "APPROVE", else reject
          def comment = (f.hr_comment.value ?: "").trim().toLowerCase()
          if (comment.startsWith("approve")) {
            change go_hr_approve value { 1 }; change go_hr_reject value { 0 };
            change status value { "approved" }
          } else {
            change go_hr_approve value { 0 }; change go_hr_reject value { 1 };
            change status value { "hr_rejected" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="8"><![CDATA[
          go_hr_reject: f.go_hr_reject, employee_email: f.employee_email, hr_comment: f.hr_comment;
          if ((go_hr_reject.value as Integer) == 1) {
            sendEmail([employee_email.value], "Leave Request Rejected by HR", "Your leave request was rejected by HR. Comment: ${hr_comment.value}")
            async.run { assignTask("submit_request"); finishTask("submit_request") }
          } else {
            async.run { assignTask("final_approval"); finishTask("final_approval") }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>final_approval</id>
    <x>688</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Leave Approved</label>
    <icon>check_circle</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>system</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <event type="finish"><id>final_finish</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="9"><![CDATA[
          employee_email: f.employee_email, leave_type: f.leave_type, start_date: f.start_date, end_date: f.end_date;
          sendEmail([employee_email.value], "Leave Request Approved", "Your leave request (${leave_type.value}) from ${start_date.value} to ${end_date.value} has been approved.")
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>status_task</id>
    <x>304</x><y>16</y>
    <label>Status</label>
    <icon>info</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>employee</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>status_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Status View</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>status</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>manager_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>hr_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>leave_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>start_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>end_date</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>attachment</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <place><id>start</id><x>16</x><y>208</y><label>Start</label><tokens>1</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_submit</id><x>208</x><y>208</y><label>Submitted</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_manager_review</id><x>400</x><y>208</y><label>Manager Review</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_hr_review</id><x>592</x><y>208</y><label>HR Review</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_final</id><x>784</x><y>208</y><label>Final Approval</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>
  <place><id>p_status</id><x>208</x><y>16</y><label>Status Place</label><tokens>0</tokens><static>false</static></place>

  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId><destinationId>submit_request</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>submit_request</sourceId><destinationId>p_submit</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_submit</sourceId><destinationId>manager_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager approve/reject variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a4a</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_hr_review</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_manager_approve</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a4b</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>start</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_manager_reject</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_hr_review</sourceId><destinationId>hr_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- HR approve/reject variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a6a</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>hr_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_final</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_hr_approve</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a6b</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>hr_review</sourceId><destinationId>start</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_hr_reject</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_final</sourceId><destinationId>final_approval</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Status persistent view -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>submit_request</sourceId><destinationId>p_status</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_status</sourceId><destinationId>status_task</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
</document>
```

title: ✅GEMINI - The application should consist of two separate but link…

history.content: The application should consist of two separate but linked processes: a List process and an Item process. The List process contains a single permanently open task with a taskRef panel and an Add button. When the user clicks Add, a new Item case is created automatically and its task is immediately embedded as an inline editable panel inside the List task — the user can fill in the item fields directly without navigating away. Each click of Add creates one more Item case and adds its task panel to the list. The Item process is a simple form with a name (required), a description, and a numeric value field. The item task uses the system role so it can be embedded and kept alive inside the List taskRef panel. The List process must be internal — authenticated users only. There is no approval step, no routing, and no end state — the list stays permanently open so items can be added and edited at any time.

This application consists of two linked processes: a **List** process that acts as a persistent dashboard and an **Item** process that serves as the data entry form for individual entries. The List process uses a read-arc pattern to keep a single task permanently open, while the Item process uses the `system` role to allow its tasks to be embedded as editable panels within the List via a `taskRef` field.

### List Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>list_process</id>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <initials>LST</initials>
    <title>Item Management List</title>
    <icon>list_alt</icon>
    <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
    <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
    <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>
    <role>
        <id>system</id>
        <title>System</title>
    </role>
    <data type="taskRef">
        <id>item_tasks</id>
        <title>Items</title>
    </data>
    <data type="button">
        <id>add_item</id>
        <title/>
        <placeholder>Add New Item</placeholder>
        <init>1</init>
        <event type="set">
            <id>add_item_set</id>
            <actions phase="pre">
                <action id="1"><![CDATA[
                    item_tasks: f.item_tasks;
                    def newItem = createCase(workspace + "item_process", "New Item", "blue")
                    def tid = newItem.tasks.find { it.transition == "item_form" }?.task
                    if (tid) {
                        change item_tasks value { (item_tasks.value ?: []) + tid }
                    }
                ]]></action>
            </actions>
        </event>
    </data>
    <transition>
        <id>dashboard</id>
        <x>304</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Manage Items</label>
        <icon>dashboard</icon>
        <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
        <dataGroup>
            <id>dg_list</id>
            <cols>1</cols>
            <layout>grid</layout>
            <title>Item List</title>
            <dataRef>
                <id>add_item</id>
                <logic>
                    <behavior>editable</behavior>
                </logic>
                <layout>
                    <x>0</x>
                    <y>0</y>
                    <rows>1</rows>
                    <cols>1</cols>
                    <template>material</template>
                    <appearance>raised</appearance>
                </layout>
            </dataRef>
            <dataRef>
                <id>item_tasks</id>
                <logic>
                    <behavior>visible</behavior>
                </logic>
                <layout>
                    <x>0</x>
                    <y>1</y>
                    <rows>1</rows>
                    <cols>1</cols>
                    <template>material</template>
                    <appearance>outline</appearance>
                </layout>
            </dataRef>
        </dataGroup>
    </transition>
    <place>
        <id>p_main</id>
        <x>112</x>
        <y>208</y>
        <label>Active</label>
        <tokens>1</tokens>
        <static>false</static>
    </place>
    <arc>
        <id>a_read</id>
        <type>read</type>
        <sourceId>p_main</sourceId>
        <destinationId>dashboard</destinationId>
        <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
    </arc>
</document>
```

### Item Process

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
    <id>item_process</id>
```

title: ✅OPENAI - The application should be an internal bug tracking work…

history.content: The application should be an internal bug tracking workflow for authenticated software development teams. A reporter submits a bug by filling in a title (required), a description of the problem (required), steps to reproduce (required), a severity level (required — dropdown: Critical, High, Medium, Low), the affected component, and an optional screenshot attachment. After submission, a triage team member reviews the report, sets the internal priority, writes triage notes, and assigns the bug to the correct developer using a user selector field. The assigned developer works on the fix, writes a description of the changes made (required), and marks the bug as ready for verification. A QA engineer then verifies the fix — if verification passes, the bug is marked as resolved and the original reporter receives an email notification. If the QA engineer rejects the fix, they must provide mandatory rejection feedback and the bug loops back to the developer for rework. This rework loop can repeat any number of times until QA accepts the fix. At all times the reporter should have a persistent status view showing the current state of their bug report and, once resolved, a summary of what was fixed.

This workflow implements an internal bug tracking system for authenticated teams. It includes roles for Reporter, Triage, Developer, and QA. The process collects all required bug details, routes the report through triage (where priority and assignment are set), then to the assigned developer, and on to QA for verification. If QA rejects the fix, the process loops back to the developer for rework, repeating as needed. The reporter always has a persistent status view, and receives an email when the bug is resolved.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>bug_tracker</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>BUG</initials>
  <title>Internal Bug Tracker</title>
  <icon>bug_report</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>
  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create">
      <id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="1"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("submit_bug"); }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>
  <role>
    <id>reporter</id>
    <title>Reporter</title>
  </role>
  <role>
    <id>triage</id>
    <title>Triage</title>
  </role>
  <role>
    <id>developer</id>
    <title>Developer</title>
  </role>
  <role>
    <id>qa</id>
    <title>QA</title>
  </role>
  <role>
    <id>system</id>
    <title>System</title>
  </role>
  <data type="text">
    <id>bug_title</id>
    <title>Title</title>
    <init/>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>bug_description</id>
    <title>Description</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
    <title>Steps to Reproduce</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>severity</id>
    <title>Severity</title>
    <options>
      <option key="critical">Critical</option>
      <option key="high">High</option>
      <option key="medium">Medium</option>
      <option key="low">Low</option>
    </options>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>component</id>
    <title>Affected Component</title>
    <init/>
  </data>
  <data type="file">
    <id>screenshot</id>
    <title>Screenshot</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>preview</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>internal_priority</id>
    <title>Internal Priority</title>
    <options>
      <option key="p1">P1 - Urgent</option>
      <option key="p2">P2 - High</option>
      <option key="p3">P3 - Medium</option>
      <option key="p4">P4 - Low</option>
    </options>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>triage_notes</id>
    <title>Triage Notes</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="user">
    <id>assigned_developer</id>
    <title>Assigned Developer</title>
    <init/>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>fix_description</id>
    <title>Fix Description</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>qa_decision</id>
    <title>QA Decision</title>
    <options>
      <option key="accept">Accept</option>
      <option key="reject">Reject</option>
    </options>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>qa_feedback</id>
    <title>QA Feedback</title>
    <init/>
    <component><name>textarea</name></component>
  </data>
  <data type="text">
    <id>status</id>
    <title>Status</title>
    <init>New</init>
  </data>
  <data type="user">
    <id>reporter_user</id>
    <title>Reporter User</title>
    <init/>
  </data>
  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>status_panel</id>
    <title>Status Panel</title>
    <init>status_view</init>
  </data>
  <transition>
    <id>submit_bug</id>
    <x>112</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Submit Bug</label>
    <icon>bug_report</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>reporter</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>bug_report_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Bug Report</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_description</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>component</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>optional</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>screenshot</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>optional</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>submit_bug_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="2"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status, reporter_user: f.reporter_user;
          change status value { "Submitted" };
          change reporter_user value { userService.loggedOrSystem.transformToUser() };
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="3"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("triage_bug"); }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <transition>
    <id>triage_bug</id>
    <x>304</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Triage Bug</label>
    <icon>assignment_ind</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>triage</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>triage_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Triage</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>internal_priority</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>triage_notes</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>optional</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>assigned_developer</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>triage_bug_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="4"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status;
          change status value { "In Development" };
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="5"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("dev_fix"); }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <transition>
    <id>dev_fix</id>
    <x>496</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Developer Fix</label>
    <icon>build</icon>
    <assignPolicy>manual</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>developer</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dev_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Developer Work</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>dev_fix_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="6"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status;
          change status value { "Ready for QA" };
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="7"><![CDATA[
          async.run { assignTask("qa_verify"); }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <transition>
    <id>qa_verify</id>
    <x>688</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>QA Verification</label>
    <icon>fact_check</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>qa</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>qa_group</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>QA Verification</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>qa_decision</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>required</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set">
          <id>qa_decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post">
            <action id="8"><![CDATA[
              t_qa: t.qa_verify, qa_feedback: f.qa_feedback, qa_decision: f.qa_decision;
              if (qa_decision.value == "reject") {
                make qa_feedback, editable on t_qa when { true }
                make qa_feedback, required on t_qa when { true }
              } else {
                make qa_feedback, hidden on t_qa when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>
          </actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>qa_feedback</id>
        <logic>
          <behavior>editable</behavior>
          <behavior>optional</behavior>
          <behavior>hidden</behavior>
        </logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>qa_verify_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="9"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision, status: f.status;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            change status value { "Resolved" }
          } else {
            change status value { "Rework Required" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="10"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision, reporter_user: f.reporter_user, bug_title: f.bug_title, fix_description: f.fix_description;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            sendEmail([reporter_user.value?.email], "Bug Resolved: ${bug_title.value}", "Your reported bug has been resolved. Fix: ${fix_description.value}")
          }
        ]]></action>
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            async.run { assignTask("status_view"); }
          } else {
            async.run { assignTask("dev_fix"); }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <transition>
    <id>status_view</id>
    <x>304</x>
    <y>16</y>
    <label>Status View</label>
    <icon>visibility</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>reporter</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>status</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>internal_priority</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>assigned_developer</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>qa_feedback</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>status_panel</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>
  <place>
    <id>start</id>
    <x>16</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Start</label>
    <tokens>1</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_submit</id>
    <x>208</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Submitted</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_triage</id>
    <x>400</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Triage</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_dev</id>
    <x>592</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Development</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_qa</id>
    <x>784</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>QA</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_status</id>

  <arc>

  <arc>

    <sourceId>p_submit</sourceId>
    <destinationId>triage_bug</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a4</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>triage_bug</sourceId>
    <destinationId>p_triage</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a5</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>p_triage</sourceId>
    <destinationId>dev_fix</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a6</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>dev_fix</sourceId>
    <destinationId>p_dev</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a7</id>
    <type>regular</type>

  </arc>
  <arc>

    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
  <!-- Variable arcs for QA decision (accept/reject) -->
  <arc>
    <id>a9</id>

    <destinationId>status_view</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>0</multiplicity>

  </arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a10</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>p_qa</sourceId>
    <destinationId>dev_fix</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>0</multiplicity>
    <reference>qa_reject_flag</reference>
  </arc>
  <!-- Read arc for persistent status view -->
  <arc>
    <id>a11</id>
    <type>read</type>

  <!-- After submission, always enable status view -->
  <arc>

  <!-- After QA accept, always enable status view -->

  <!-- Routing flags for QA decision -->

  <data type="number">

  <transition>

    <x>880</x>

    <icon>call_split</icon>
    <roleRef>
      <id>system</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <!-- No dataGroup -->
    <event type="assign">
      <id>qa_router_assign</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="12"><![CDATA[
          qa_decision: f.qa_decision, qa_accept_flag: f.qa_accept_flag, qa_reject_flag: f.qa_reject_flag;
          if (qa_decision.value == "accept") {
            change qa_accept_flag value { 1 };
            change qa_reject_flag value { 0 };
          } else {
            change qa_accept_flag value { 0 };
            change qa_reject_flag value { 1 };
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
    <event type="assign">
      <id>qa_router_assign_post</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="13"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            def t = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("qa_decision_router").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
            if (t) finishTask(t)
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>
  <arc>
    <id>a14</id>
    <type>regular</type>
    <sourceId>p_qa</sourceId>
    <destinationId>qa_decision_router</destinationId>
    <multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
  </arc>
</document>
```

title: ❌ -> ✅ CLAUDE - The application should be an internal procurement workf…

history.content: The application should be an internal procurement workflow for authenticated employees. A submitter fills in a purchase order form with vendor name (required), amount (required), category (required — dropdown with options: Software, Hardware, Services, Other), business justification (required), a detailed description, and an optional supporting document attachment. After submission, the PO is sent simultaneously to both the Legal department and the Finance department for parallel review — both reviews must be completed before the process can continue. The Legal reviewer checks contractual compliance and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. The Finance reviewer checks budget availability and either approves or rejects with a mandatory comment. If either reviewer rejects, the submitter is notified by email with the rejection reason and the request loops back so they can revise and resubmit. Once both Legal and Finance have approved, the Procurement Manager receives a task showing both review outcomes and makes the final decision to issue or reject the PO. If issued, the submitter receives an email confirmation. Throughout the process the submitter should have a persistent status view showing current state, reviewer comments, and the final outcome.

A parallel-review procurement workflow where AND-split feeds Legal and Finance simultaneously, an AND-join system bridge checks both decisions and either loops the submitter back for revision (with email notification) or advances to the Procurement Manager for final issuance. A permanently alive status task on a read arc gives the submitter a persistent view of state, reviewer comments, and outcome throughout.

```xml
  <transition>
    <id>t_bridge</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Bridge - Check Decisions</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_bridge_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="10"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          def legalOk   = legal_decision.value   == "approve"
          def financeOk = finance_decision.value == "approve"
          if (legalOk && financeOk) {
            change go_final  value { 1 }
            change go_revise value { 0 }
            change status    value { "Both Approved - Awaiting Manager Decision" }
          } else {
            change go_final  value { 0 }
            change go_revise value { 1 }
            change status    value { "Rejected - Revision Required" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          go_revise: f.go_revise, submitter_email: f.submitter_email,
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, legal_comment: f.legal_comment,
          finance_decision: f.finance_decision, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          vendor_name: f.vendor_name;
          if ((go_revise.value as Integer) == 1) {
            def reasons = []
            if (legal_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Legal: ${legal_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            if (finance_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Finance: ${finance_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} has been rejected and requires revision.\n\nRejection reasons:\n${reasons.join('\n')}\n\nPlease log in to revise and resubmit your request."
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Rejected - Revision Required", body)
            async.run {
              try {
                assignTask("t_notify_rejection")
                finishTask("t_notify_rejection")
              } catch (e) {}
            }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_notify_rejection</id>
    <x>1264</x><y>304</y>
    <label>Route to Revision</label>

    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_notify_rejection_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="12"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          legal_approve: f.legal_approve, legal_reject: f.legal_reject,
          finance_approve: f.finance_approve, finance_reject: f.finance_reject,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise;
          change legal_approve   value { 0 }
          change legal_reject    value { 0 }
          change finance_approve value { 0 }
          change finance_reject  value { 0 }
          change go_final        value { 0 }
          change go_revise       value { 0 }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_manager_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="13"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision, manager_issue: f.manager_issue,
          manager_reject_flag: f.manager_reject_flag, status: f.status;
          if (manager_decision.value == "issue") {
            change manager_issue      value { 1 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 0 }
            change status             value { "PO Issued" }
          } else {
            change manager_issue      value { 0 }
            change manager_reject_flag value { 1 }
            change status             value { "Rejected by Procurement Manager" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="14"><![CDATA[
          manager_decision: f.manager_decision;
          if (manager_decision.value == "issue") {
            async.run {
              try {
                assignTask("t_send_issued")
                finishTask("t_send_issued")
              } catch (e) {}
            }
          } else {
            async.run {
              try {
                assignTask("t_send_mgr_rejected")
                finishTask("t_send_mgr_rejected")
              } catch (e) {}
            }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>

```
it is not correct

The primary structural error was Place→Place arcs (`p_legal_done → p_join` and `p_finance_done → p_join`), which violates the strict Place→Transition→Place rule. The fix is to remove `p_join` entirely and connect both done-places directly into `t_bridge` with multiplicity 1 each — that is the correct AND-join. Several arc IDs and coordinates were also cleaned up in the process.

```xml
            <action id="4"><![CDATA[

              if (legal_decision.value == "reject") {
                make legal_comment, required on t_legal when { true }
              } else {
                make legal_comment, optional on t_legal when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>
          </actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>legal_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_legal_finish</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="5"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            try {
              def t = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("t_bridge").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
              if (t) { assignTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem); finishTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem) }
            } catch (e) {}
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_finance</id>
    <x>880</x><y>304</y>
    <label>Finance Review</label>
    <icon>account_balance</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>finance</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>finance_decision</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set">
          <id>finance_decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post">
            <action id="6"><![CDATA[
              t_finance: t.t_finance, finance_decision: f.finance_decision, finance_comment: f.finance_comment;
              if (finance_decision.value == "reject") {
                make finance_comment, required on t_finance when { true }
              } else {
                make finance_comment, optional on t_finance when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>
          </actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>finance_comment</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>optional</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_finance_finish</id>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="7"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            try {
              def t = findTask { it.transitionId.eq("t_bridge").and(it.caseId.eq(useCase.stringId)) }
              if (t) { assignTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem); finishTask(t, userService.loggedOrSystem) }
            } catch (e) {}
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_bridge</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Check Both Decisions</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_bridge_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="8"><![CDATA[
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, finance_decision: f.finance_decision,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          def legalOk   = legal_decision.value   == "approve"
          def financeOk = finance_decision.value == "approve"
          if (legalOk && financeOk) {
            change go_final  value { 1 }
            change go_revise value { 0 }
            change status    value { "Both Approved - Awaiting Manager Decision" }
          } else {
            change go_final  value { 0 }
            change go_revise value { 1 }
            change status    value { "Rejected - Revision Required" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="9"><![CDATA[
          go_revise: f.go_revise, submitter_email: f.submitter_email,
          legal_decision: f.legal_decision, legal_comment: f.legal_comment,
          finance_decision: f.finance_decision, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          vendor_name: f.vendor_name;
          if ((go_revise.value as Integer) == 1) {
            def reasons = []
            if (legal_decision.value == "reject")   reasons << "Legal: ${legal_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            if (finance_decision.value == "reject") reasons << "Finance: ${finance_comment.value ?: 'No comment provided'}"
            def body = "Your purchase order for ${vendor_name.value} has been rejected and requires revision.\n\nRejection reasons:\n${reasons.join('\n')}\n\nPlease log in to revise and resubmit your request."
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Purchase Order Rejected - Revision Required", body)
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <transition>
    <id>t_reset</id>
    <x>1264</x><y>400</y>
    <label>Reset for Revision</label>
    <roleRef><id>system</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <event type="finish">

        <action id="10"><![CDATA[

          legal_comment: f.legal_comment, finance_comment: f.finance_comment,
          go_final: f.go_final, go_revise: f.go_revise, status: f.status;
          change legal_comment   value { "" }
          change finance_comment value { "" }
          change go_final        value { 0 }
          change go_revise       value { 0 }
          change status          value { "Revision in Progress" }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="11"><![CDATA[
          async.run {
            try { assignTask("t_submit"); finishTask("t_submit") } catch (e) {}
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- Arcs -->

  <!-- start → t_submit -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>start</sourceId><destinationId>t_submit</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_submit → p0 and p_status -->
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId><destinationId>p0</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId><destinationId>p_status</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- p_status → t_detail (read arc - never consumed, status always visible) -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_status</sourceId><destinationId>t_detail</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- p0 → t_split -->
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p0</sourceId><destinationId>t_split</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_split → parallel branches (AND-split) -->
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_in</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_in</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Legal branch -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_in</sourceId><destinationId>t_legal</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_done</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Finance branch -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_in</sourceId><destinationId>t_finance</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_finance</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_done</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- AND-join: both done places → t_bridge (fires only when both have tokens) -->
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_bridge</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_bridge XOR fork via variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId><destinationId>p_approved</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_final</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_bridge</sourceId><destinationId>p_revise</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_revise</reference></arc>
  <!-- Approved path → manager -->
  <arc><id>a16</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_approved</sourceId><destinationId>t_manager</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager XOR fork via variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a17</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager</sourceId><destinationId>p_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>manager_issue</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a18</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager</sourceId><destinationId>p_mgr_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>manager_reject_flag</reference></arc>
  <!-- Issued → done -->
  <arc><id>a19</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_issued</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager rejected → done -->
  <arc><id>a20</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_mgr_rejected</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Revision path: p_revise → t_reset → back to start (loop) -->
  <arc><id>a21</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_revise</sourceId><destinationId>t_reset</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc>
    <id>a22</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_reset</sourceId><destinationId>start</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
    <breakpoint><x>1264</x><y>592</y></breakpoint>
    <breakpoint><x>112</x><y>592</y></breakpoint>
  </arc>

</document>
```

title: ✅The application should be an internal bug tracking work…

history.content: The application should be an internal bug tracking workflow for authenticated software development teams. A reporter submits a bug by filling in a title (required), a description of the problem (required), steps to reproduce (required), a severity level (required — dropdown: Critical, High, Medium, Low), the affected component, and an optional screenshot attachment. After submission, a triage team member reviews the report, sets the internal priority, writes triage notes, and assigns the bug to the correct developer using a user selector field. The assigned developer works on the fix, writes a description of the changes made (required), and marks the bug as ready for verification. A QA engineer then verifies the fix — if verification passes, the bug is marked as resolved and the original reporter receives an email notification. If the QA engineer rejects the fix, they must provide mandatory rejection feedback and the bug loops back to the developer for rework. This rework loop can repeat any number of times until QA accepts the fix. At all times the reporter should have a persistent status view showing the current state of their bug report and, once resolved, a summary of what was fixed.

A four-role internal bug tracker (Reporter → Triage → Developer → QA) is built with a rework loop from QA rejection back to the developer's input place, a persistent read-arc status panel for the reporter, and variable-arc routing on the QA decision to either resolve or re-open the fix task.

```xml
<document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
          xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="https://petriflow.com/petriflow.schema.xsd">
  <id>bug_tracker</id>
  <version>1.0.0</version>
  <initials>BUG</initials>
  <title>Bug Tracker</title>
  <icon>bug_report</icon>
  <defaultRole>true</defaultRole>
  <anonymousRole>false</anonymousRole>
  <transitionRole>false</transitionRole>

  <caseEvents>
    <event type="create"><id>on_create</id>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="1"><![CDATA[
        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Awaiting Triage" }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </caseEvents>

  <role><id>reporter</id><title>Reporter</title></role>
  <role><id>triage</id><title>Triage</title></role>
  <role><id>developer</id><title>Developer</title></role>
  <role><id>qa</id><title>QA Engineer</title></role>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ DATA FIELDS -->

  <data type="text">
    <id>bug_title</id>
    <title>Bug Title</title>
  </data>

  <data type="text">
    <id>description</id>

  </data>

  <data type="text">

  <data type="enumeration_map">
    <id>severity</id>

    <options>
      <option key="critical">Critical</option>
      <option key="high">High</option>
      <option key="medium">Medium</option>
      <option key="low">Low</option>

  <data type="text">

  <data type="enumeration_map">

      <option key="pass">Pass - Mark Resolved</option>

  <data type="dateTime">

  <!-- routing fields -->

    <id>go_resolved</id>

    <init>0</init>
  </data>

  <data type="number">
    <id>go_rework</id>

    <init>0</init>
  </data>

  <!-- status panel taskRef -->
  <data type="taskRef">
    <id>status_panel</id>
    <title>My Bug Report</title>
    <init>t_status_view</init>
  </data>

  <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ TRANSITIONS -->

  <!-- 1. Submit Bug -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_submit</id>
    <x>208</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Submit Bug Report</label>
    <icon>bug_report</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>reporter</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_submit</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Bug Report</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>

      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">

        change status value { "In Triage" }
        change reporter_email value { userService.loggedOrSystem.email }
        changeCaseProperty("title").about { bug_title.value ?: "New Bug" }

  <!-- 2. Triage -->
  <transition>

    <roleRef><id>triage</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>

      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>affected_component</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>screenshot</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>internal_priority</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>assigned_developer</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>5</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>triage_notes</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>

    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>triage_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="3"><![CDATA[

  <!-- 3. Developer Fix -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_dev_fix</id>
    <x>784</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Implement Fix</label>
    <icon>code</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>developer</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_dev</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Development</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

      <dataRef>
        <id>triage_notes</id>

      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_feedback</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>

        <layout><x>0</x><y>6</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>

        status: f.status;
        change status value { "Awaiting QA Verification" }
      ]]></action></actions>

  </transition>

  <!-- 4. QA Verify -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_qa_verify</id>
    <x>1072</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Verify Fix</label>
    <icon>verified</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef><id>qa</id><logic><perform>true</perform></logic></roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_qa</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>QA Verification</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>bug_title</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>steps_to_reproduce</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>severity</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>fix_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>qa_decision</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set"><id>qa_decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post"><action id="5"><![CDATA[
            t_qa_verify: t.t_qa_verify, qa_decision: f.qa_decision, rejection_feedback: f.rejection_feedback;
            if (qa_decision.value == "fail") {
              make rejection_feedback, editable on t_qa_verify when { true }
              make rejection_feedback, required on t_qa_verify when { true }
            } else {
              make rejection_feedback, hidden on t_qa_verify when { true }
            }
          ]]></action></actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_feedback</id>
        <logic><behavior>hidden</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <component><name>textarea</name></component>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>qa_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre"><action id="6"><![CDATA[
        go_resolved: f.go_resolved, go_rework: f.go_rework,
        qa_decision: f.qa_decision, status: f.status;
        if (qa_decision.value == "pass") {
          change go_resolved value { 1 }
          change go_rework value { 0 }
          change status value { "Resolved" }
        } else {
          change go_resolved value { 0 }
          change go_rework value { 1 }
          change status value { "In Development - Rework" }
        }
      ]]></action></actions>
      <actions phase="post"><action id="7"><![CDATA[
        qa_decision: f.qa_decision, reporter_email: f.reporter_email,
        bug_title: f.bug_title, fix_description: f.fix_description, resolved_at: f.resolved_at;
        if (qa_decision.value == "pass") {
          change resolved_at value { java.time.LocalDateTime.now() }
          sendEmail(
            [reporter_email.value],
            "Bug Resolved: ${bug_title.value}",
            "Your bug report has been resolved.\n\nFix summary: ${fix_description.value}"
          )
          changeCaseProperty("color").about { "green" }
        }
      ]]></action></actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- 5. Status View (persistent, read arc, reporter-facing) -->
  <transition>
```
