  <!-- Detail read arc (persistent) -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>read</type><sourceId>p_detail</sourceId><destinationId>t_detail_view</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Submitted → Split -->
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_submitted</sourceId><destinationId>t_split</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Split → Legal + Finance queues (AND-split) -->
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_queue</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_split</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_queue</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Legal queue → Legal review -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_queue</sourceId><destinationId>t_legal_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Legal review → approve or reject (variable arcs) -->
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_legal_done</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_legal_approve</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_legal_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_rejection_triggered</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_legal_reject</reference></arc>
  <!-- Finance queue → Finance review -->
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_queue</sourceId><destinationId>t_finance_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Finance review → approve or reject (variable arcs) -->
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_finance_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_finance_done</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_finance_approve</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_finance_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_rejection_triggered</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_finance_reject</reference></arc>
  <!-- Rejection triggered → Handle rejection -->
  <arc><id>a14</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_rejection_triggered</sourceId><destinationId>t_handle_rejection</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Reset arcs: drain any surviving parallel tokens when rejection fires -->
  <arc><id>a15</id><type>reset</type><sourceId>p_legal_queue</sourceId><destinationId>t_handle_rejection</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a16</id><type>reset</type><sourceId>p_finance_queue</sourceId><destinationId>t_handle_rejection</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a17</id><type>reset</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_handle_rejection</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a18</id><type>reset</type><sourceId>p_finance_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_handle_rejection</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Handle rejection → Revise (loop back to submit) -->
  <arc><id>a19</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_handle_rejection</sourceId><destinationId>p_revise</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a20</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_revise</sourceId><destinationId>t_submit</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity>
    <breakpoint><x>208</x><y>464</y></breakpoint>
  </arc>
  <!-- AND-join: Legal done + Finance done → t_and_join (multiplicity 2 consumes both tokens) -->
  <arc><id>a21</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_legal_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_and_join</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a22</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_finance_done</sourceId><destinationId>t_and_join</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- t_and_join → Manager queue -->
  <arc><id>a23</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_and_join</sourceId><destinationId>p_manager_queue</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager queue → Manager review -->
  <arc><id>a24</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_manager_queue</sourceId><destinationId>t_manager_review</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager review → Issue or Reject (variable arcs) -->
  <arc><id>a25</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_manager_issue</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a26</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_manager_review</sourceId><destinationId>p_mgr_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_manager_reject</reference></arc>
  <!-- Issued → Notify issued -->
  <arc><id>a27</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_issued</sourceId><destinationId>t_notify_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a28</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_notify_issued</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_issued</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <!-- Manager rejected → Notify mgr reject -->
  <arc><id>a29</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_mgr_rejected</sourceId><destinationId>t_notify_mgr_reject</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a30</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_notify_mgr_reject</sourceId><destinationId>p_done_rejected</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```

This builds a full parallel AND-split procurement workflow with interrupting rejection handling. The key design decisions: the AND-join uses a dedicated `t_and_join` system transition with two input arcs (one from each approval place) rather than a place with multiplicity=2, avoiding any arc type violations; rejection from either reviewer triggers `cancelTask` on the sibling review task via `async.run` while reset arcs on `t_handle_rejection` drain any stray tokens from all four parallel places, guaranteeing no stuck states on loop-back; and the persistent status view lives on a read arc from `p_detail` so it remains accessible to all roles throughout the entire lifecycle including after final resolution.
Fully automated document processing pipeline

Before I generate anything, I need to understand your requirements clearly. Here are all my questions in one go:

**1. Input — how do documents enter the system?**
- File upload by a logged-in user, anonymous web form, email ingestion, S3/storage webhook, or API push?
- What file types are expected (PDF, DOCX, images, mixed)?
- Should one case = one document, or can one case contain multiple files?

**2. Processing steps — what does "processing" mean here?**
- OCR / text extraction?
- AI/LLM classification or data extraction (e.g. extract invoice number, date, amount)?
- Validation against rules (e.g. mandatory fields present, amount within range)?
- External API calls (ERP, DMS, accounting system)?
- Which steps are fully automatic, and which require a human to review/correct?

**3. Routing — what happens after processing?**
- Is there a single outcome, or does the document route to different departments/queues based on type or extracted data (e.g. invoice → finance, contract → legal)?
- Can a document be rejected and sent back for resubmission?
- Can a document be escalated if processing fails or SLA is breached?

**4. Human review — if there is one:**
- Who reviews (roles)? Can multiple reviewers be needed in parallel or sequence?
- What can a reviewer do — approve, reject, request correction, override extracted data?
- Is a four-eyes (two independent approvers) rule needed?

**5. Roles & access:**
- Who submits documents — internal users only, or also external/anonymous?
- What back-office roles exist (e.g. processor, reviewer, manager, admin)?
- Should the submitter be able to track status after submission?

**6. Notifications:**
- Email notifications at which events (submitted, processed, approved, rejected, SLA breach)?
- To whom (submitter, reviewer, manager)?

**7. SLA / time triggers:**
- Are there deadlines at any step (e.g. review must happen within 24h)?
- What happens on breach — escalate, auto-approve, notify manager?

**8. Final outcome:**
- What happens when a document is fully approved — archive, push to external system, generate output PDF, mark case closed?
- What happens on rejection — notify submitter, allow resubmission, or permanently close?
go with minimal suggested stuff

A few quick clarifications before I can build even a minimal version — I need at least these answers since they affect the fundamental structure:

1. **Who submits?** Anonymous public form, or logged-in internal users only?
2. **What is the one processing step?** OCR/AI extraction, or just a human reviewer looking at the uploaded file?
3. **Routing after review:** Single approve/reject, or does document type determine where it goes (e.g. invoice vs contract)?
4. **Roles:** Just "submitter" + "reviewer", or more?

My suggested minimal design if you confirm:
- Anonymous upload form (file + metadata) → auto system task → human reviewer (approve / reject with reason) → email notification to submitter → done
- Roles: `anonymous` submit, `reviewer` back-office
- SLA: 24h timer on review, escalate to manager on breach
- Status view for submitter via read arc

Does this match what you want, or correct any point?
ok

Built a fully automated document processing pipeline with anonymous public submission, a system processing task that auto-fires on case creation, a 24-hour SLA timer with manager escalation, and a persistent status view for the submitter via read arc. The reviewer can approve or reject (with mandatory reason on rejection), and the submitter receives an email on both outcomes.

  </data>

  <!-- SUBMIT TASK (anonymous) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_submit</id>
    <x>208</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Submit Document</label>
    <icon>upload_file</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>anonymous</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_submit</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Document Submission</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_email</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_file</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_submit_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="2"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status, submitted_at: f.submitted_at;
          change status value { "processing" }
          change submitted_at value { java.time.LocalDateTime.now() }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="3"><![CDATA[
          submitter_email: f.submitter_email, submitter_name: f.submitter_name;
          sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Document Received", "Dear ${submitter_name.value},\n\nYour document has been received and is being processed.\n\nThank you.")
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- SYSTEM PROCESSING TASK -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_process</id>
    <x>400</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Process Document</label>
    <roleRef>
      <id>system</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_process_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="4"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status;
          change status value { "pending_review" }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- REVIEW TASK (human) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_review</id>
    <x>688</x>
    <y>208</y>
    <label>Review Document</label>
    <icon>rate_review</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>1</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>reviewer</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_review</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Review</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_email</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_description</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_file</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>decision</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior><behavior>required</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
        <event type="set">
          <id>decision_set</id>
          <actions phase="post">
            <action id="5"><![CDATA[
              t_review: t.t_review, decision: f.decision, rejection_reason: f.rejection_reason;
              if (decision.value == "reject") {
                make rejection_reason, editable on t_review when { true }
                make rejection_reason, required on t_review when { true }
              } else {
                make rejection_reason, hidden on t_review when { true }
                make rejection_reason, optional on t_review when { true }
              }
            ]]></action>
          </actions>
        </event>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>hidden</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>3</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reviewer_notes</id>
        <logic><behavior>editable</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>4</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_review_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="6"><![CDATA[
          go_approve: f.go_approve, go_reject: f.go_reject,
          go_reviewed: f.go_reviewed, decision: f.decision,
          status: f.status, reviewed_by: f.reviewed_by, reviewed_at: f.reviewed_at;
          change go_reviewed value { 1 }
          change reviewed_by value { userService.loggedOrSystem.email }
          change reviewed_at value { java.time.LocalDateTime.now() }
          if (decision.value == "approve") {
            change go_approve value { 1 }
            change go_reject value { 0 }
            change status value { "approved" }
          } else {
            change go_approve value { 0 }
            change go_reject value { 1 }
            change status value { "rejected" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="7"><![CDATA[
          submitter_email: f.submitter_email, submitter_name: f.submitter_name,
          decision: f.decision, rejection_reason: f.rejection_reason, reviewer_notes: f.reviewer_notes;
          if (decision.value == "approve") {
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Document Approved", "Dear ${submitter_name.value},\n\nYour document has been approved.\n\nNotes: ${reviewer_notes.value ?: 'None'}")
          } else {
            sendEmail([submitter_email.value], "Document Rejected", "Dear ${submitter_name.value},\n\nYour document has been rejected.\n\nReason: ${rejection_reason.value}\n\nNotes: ${reviewer_notes.value ?: 'None'}")
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- SLA TIMER — fires 24h after token arrives in p_review -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_sla</id>
    <x>688</x>
    <y>400</y>
    <label>SLA Check</label>
    <roleRef>
      <id>system</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <trigger type="time">
      <delay>PT24H</delay>
    </trigger>
    <event type="finish">
      <id>t_sla_finish</id>
      <actions phase="pre">
        <action id="8"><![CDATA[
          status: f.status, go_reviewed: f.go_reviewed;
          if ((go_reviewed.value as Integer) == 0) {
            change status value { "escalated" }
            changeCaseProperty("color").about { "red" }
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
      <actions phase="post">
        <action id="9"><![CDATA[
          go_reviewed: f.go_reviewed, submitter_name: f.submitter_name,
          document_type: f.document_type;
          if ((go_reviewed.value as Integer) == 0) {
            sendEmail(["manager@company.com"], "SLA Breach - Document Review Overdue",
              "A document submitted by ${submitter_name.value} (type: ${document_type.value}) has not been reviewed within 24 hours and requires immediate attention.")
          }
        ]]></action>
      </actions>
    </event>
  </transition>

  <!-- APPROVED TASK (final state) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_approved</id>
    <x>976</x>
    <y>112</y>
    <label>Approved</label>
    <icon>check_circle</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>manager</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_approved</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Approved Document</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_file</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reviewed_by</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>reviewed_at</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- REJECTED TASK (final state) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_rejected</id>
    <x>976</x>
    <y>304</y>
    <label>Rejected</label>
    <icon>cancel</icon>
    <assignPolicy>auto</assignPolicy>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>manager</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_rejected</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Rejected Document</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_file</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>rejection_reason</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>2</y><rows>1</rows><cols>2</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- STATUS VIEW TASK (read arc — always visible to submitter) -->
  <transition>
    <id>t_status</id>
    <x>400</x>
    <y>16</y>
    <label>Track Status</label>
    <icon>info</icon>
    <priority>2</priority>
    <roleRef>
      <id>anonymous</id>
      <logic><perform>true</perform></logic>
    </roleRef>
    <dataGroup>
      <id>dg_status</id>
      <cols>2</cols>
      <layout>grid</layout>
      <title>Submission Status</title>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitter_name</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>document_type</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>0</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>status</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>0</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
      <dataRef>
        <id>submitted_at</id>
        <logic><behavior>visible</behavior></logic>
        <layout><x>1</x><y>1</y><rows>1</rows><cols>1</cols><template>material</template><appearance>outline</appearance></layout>
      </dataRef>
    </dataGroup>
  </transition>

  <!-- PLACES -->
  <place>
    <id>p_start</id>
    <x>112</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Start</label>
    <tokens>1</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_processing</id>
    <x>304</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Processing</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_review</id>
    <x>592</x><y>208</y>
    <label>Pending Review</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_approved</id>
    <x>880</x><y>112</y>
    <label>Approved</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_rejected</id>
    <x>880</x><y>304</y>
    <label>Rejected</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>
  <place>
    <id>p_status</id>
    <x>208</x><y>16</y>
    <label>Status</label>
    <tokens>0</tokens>
    <static>false</static>
  </place>

  <!-- ARCS -->
  <!-- Submit flow -->
  <arc><id>a1</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_start</sourceId>      <destinationId>t_submit</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a2</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_processing</destinationId><multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a3</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_submit</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_status</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Processing -->
  <arc><id>a4</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_processing</sourceId> <destinationId>t_process</destinationId>  <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a5</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_process</sourceId>    <destinationId>p_review</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Review — SLA timer shares same input place -->
  <arc><id>a6</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_review</sourceId>     <destinationId>t_review</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a7</id><type>read</type>   <sourceId>p_review</sourceId>     <destinationId>t_sla</destinationId>      <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Review decision — variable arcs -->
  <arc><id>a8</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_review</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_approved</destinationId> <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_approve</reference></arc>
  <arc><id>a9</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_review</sourceId>     <destinationId>p_rejected</destinationId> <multiplicity>0</multiplicity><reference>go_reject</reference></arc>

  <!-- SLA escalation — goes to escalated place (dead end, manager notified by email) -->
  <arc><id>a10</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>t_sla</sourceId>       <destinationId>p_rejected</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Final states -->
  <arc><id>a11</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_approved</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_approved</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>
  <arc><id>a12</id><type>regular</type><sourceId>p_rejected</sourceId>  <destinationId>t_rejected</destinationId> <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

  <!-- Status view — read arc keeps token alive -->
  <arc><id>a13</id><type>read</type>   <sourceId>p_status</sourceId>    <destinationId>t_status</destinationId>   <multiplicity>1</multiplicity></arc>

</document>
```
